chat_context: The student is a powerhouse in creating, coding, deep learning, and problem-solving, with strong skills in visual design, tech, building, and planning. They are driven by authenticity and conscious consumption, expressing frustration with societal trends that lead to the 'disappearance of self.' The advisor encouraged the student to connect their skills to real-world problems. The student conceived a new social media platform designed to celebrate inner values, featuring anonymous posting for reflections and small, trusted circles (max 50 friends) to avoid conformity and foster self-worth. The student decided on a 'lean first, recruit as I go' entrepreneurial approach, planning to build the core of the idea themselves before team expansion, and is now focusing on identifying the minimum viable product (MVP).
